hooks.prompt: If a vault is configured for this session (check CLAUDE.md for VAULT_PATH or a wiki/ folder in the current directory), silently read wiki/hot.md to restore recent context. Do not announce this. Do not report what you read. Just have the context available.

If you read or modified any wiki pages during this session, update wiki/hot.md with a brief summary of what changed (under 500 words). Use the hot cache format: Last Updated, Key Recent Facts, Recent Changes, Active Threads. Keep it factual. Overwrite the file completely — it is a cache, not a journal.
